description: Computes the intersection point between two geometric objects such as lines, circles, or polygons, with a 1-based index to select among multiple intersections.
utility: Find intersection point between two geometric objects

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: Which intersection point to return (1 = first, 2 = second, etc.)

alternates.description: First intersection of line with polygon edge
Second intersection of circle with line

examples.scenario: First intersection point of two implicit parabola plots
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(2,5), 21.8, 20.2, range(-5, 5, 1), type(plotting), grid())
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"x^2 = 4y")
plot_2=plot(graph_1,"y^2 = 4x")
point_1 = intersect(graph_1, plot_2, plot_1, 1)

examples.scenario: Second intersection point of two plots
Find y-axis intercept of a line (axis intercepts lesson)
Find intersection of constraint lines for linear programming vertex
Second intersection for linear programming feasible region

examples.expression: graph_1=g2d(at(10,11),20,20,range(-5,6),type(uniform)); circle_1=circle(graph_1,point(graph_1,1.4,1.6),radius(2)); circle_2 = circle(graph_1, point(graph_1, 3.1, 2.8), radius(2)); point_1 = intersect(graph_1, circle_1, circle_2)

examples.scenario: Secant line intersecting a circle at two points
examples.expression: intersection_1 = intersect(G, secant_line, target_circle,1); intersection_2 = intersect(G, secant_line, target_circle,2)

examples.scenario: Intersection of parabola plot with vertical line for ray tracing
